releases.name: Bannerhub v3.7.5
releases.body:
> [!WARNING]
> **Only install official stable releases** (like this one). Do NOT install pre-releases or raw CI artifacts — pre-release builds use a different package name (`com.tencent.ig`) and cannot be upgraded to stable without uninstalling first.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Notification permission required.** BannerHub will prompt for the **Post Notifications** permission when you start your first Epic, GOG, or Amazon download. You must allow it to receive download progress and completion notifications. Without it, you will not be notified when downloads finish or fail.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Files access required for SD card storage.** To save games to your SD card, BannerHub must be granted the **Files and Media** permission. Go to **Android Settings → Apps → BannerHub → Permissions → Files and media** and set it to **Allow management of all files** (or equivalent on your device). Without this permission the SD card toggle will have no effect.

## Offline launch for imported PC games

**Imported PC games (and any non-Steam game source) now launch offline.**

Pre-3.7.5, putting the device in airplane mode or on a network without internet and tapping an imported PC game would abort the launch with `Game configuration file download failed`. Steam library games had a partial offline bypass already; the other four game source types (imported via the PC Game Manager, local-file import, server-downloaded, and unknown) did not.

v3.7.5 adds a no-network skip on the three setup tasks that previously required a network call: `GameConfigDownloadTask` (fetches per-game env config from the server), `SetGameRecommConfigTask` (applies server-pushed recommendations), and `DependencyInstallTask` (checks the server for new dep versions). When `NetworkUtils.r()` reports no network, those tasks are skipped and the launch proceeds with whatever components, container, and Wine version were set up the last time the game launched online.

In practice:

- **Any game that has launched online at least once will now launch offline.** Wine boots, the game runs, the previously-applied container settings persist.
- **Steam library games unaffected.** Their existing offline support is unchanged.
- **Self-healing on reconnect.** When you come back online, the next launch hits the full pipeline and re-syncs any server-pushed recommendations or dep updates. The offline window doesn't accumulate drift.
- **No behavior change online.** All three patches are pure additions wrapped in `if no network: skip; else: original code`. The online path runs the original 3.7.4 logic byte-for-byte. Verified by code review and pre1→pre4 device iteration.

### Known limitations

1. **First-ever launches still require network** — if a game has never been set up at all, no components/container are on disk to fall back to. This release only fixes the second-and-later offline launches.
2. **Stale per-game settings** — if you change a per-game setting (Box64 variant, container, etc.) and then go offline before the next launch, the offline launch uses the previous on-disk setup. Workaround: relaunch once online after changing settings, then go offline.
3. **Server-pushed component recommendations skipped offline** — practical impact nil for games already working; deferred to the next online launch.

### Tracking BannerHub updates

- **This GitHub repo's [Releases page](https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub/releases)** — watch the repo to get notified
- **[Obtainium](https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium)** — add `https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub` as an app source with **"Reconcile version string with version detected from OS"** enabled

### Upgrading

- v3.7.4 → v3.7.5: install the matching variant directly over your existing install. No certificate change, no data loss.
- v3.7.0 or earlier → v3.7.5: install normally. If the signing certificate differs, uninstall first.

releases.name: Bannerhub v3.7.4
releases.body:
> [!WARNING]
> **Only install official stable releases** (like this one). Do NOT install pre-releases or raw CI artifacts — pre-release builds use a different package name (`com.tencent.ig`) and cannot be upgraded to stable without uninstalling first.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Notification permission required.** BannerHub will prompt for the **Post Notifications** permission when you start your first Epic, GOG, or Amazon download. You must allow it to receive download progress and completion notifications.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Files access required for SD card storage.** To save games to your SD card, BannerHub must be granted the **Files and Media** permission (**Android Settings → Apps → BannerHub → Permissions → Files and media → Allow management of all files**). Without it the SD card toggle has no effect.

## What's new in v3.7.4

One focused fix: **PC Vibration / Rumble no longer breaks x86_64 / Box64 game launches.**

### The problem (v3.7.0 – v3.7.3)

The PC Vibration / Rumble feature added in v3.7.0 loaded a small helper library, `libevshim.so`, into the Wine process via `LD_PRELOAD` to keep sustained rumble alive (SDL2 otherwise auto-stops the motor after ~1 second). That worked on arm64 / FEX containers — but on **Box64**, mapping that extra library into the game's address space corrupted the dynarec and made **every x86_64 game launch die at startup** with `c000007b` / `wine has died`. If you ran x86_64 titles under Box64 on v3.7.0–v3.7.3, this is the regression that was killing your games.

### The fix (v3.7.4) — preload-free

v3.7.4 removes `libevshim.so` entirely. **No extra library is mapped into Wine anymore**, so the crash class is eliminated. Sustained rumble is preserved by patching every `winebus.so` in the container **on disk** so SDL2's ~1 s rumble auto-expiry never fires:

- **aarch64-unix** and **x86_64-unix (Box64)** byte patterns are both handled, with the rumble-*stop* call sites left untouched so release-on-let-go still works.
- Safety net: if the x86_64 pattern ever misses on a future Proton, the unmatched `winebus.so` is dumped to the app's external files directory for re-derivation rather than failing silently.
- Everything else about the feature is unchanged — independent low/high motors, single-motor blend, instant release, multi-controller auto-wake, the per-game **PC Vibration Settings** dialog, and Export/Import config. Same continuous-rumble behavior, no library injected, no launch regression.

### Validation

Device-verified before promotion:

- **Launch regression cleared:** Dead Cells and ULTRAKILL launch cleanly on **Box64 "Extreme"**, DOOMBLADE on **FEX** — no `c000007b`, no crash, no dump.
- **Dirt 3** (x86_64 / Box64): a clean **~26-minute** session with **sustained continuous rumble** confirmed in-game (no more ~1 s SDL cutoff). Wine log showed zero `evshim` tags (library fully removed, as expected) and no x86_64 dump fallback — the on-disk pattern matched this Proton build.
- **Manual in-container check:** rumble was also tested directly by running **`GameConTest.exe`** (Microsoft's XInput GameController Tester) manually inside the container, driving the low and high motors on demand to confirm the on-disk `winebus.so` patch holds the motor through sustained input independent of any specific game.

## Upgrading

- **v3.7.x → v3.7.4:** install the matching variant directly over your existing install. No certificate change, no data loss. All vibration settings (`bh_vibration_*` in `pc_g_setting<gameId>`) carry over untouched.
- **Earlier → v3.7.4:** install normally. If the signing certificate differs, uninstall first.
- Variants with different package names cannot replace each other in-place.

## Credits

- **PC-accurate Vibration / Rumble** — original feature by **[TideGear](https://github.com/TideGear)** via [PR #80](https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub/pull/80), rebased from [GameNative PR #1214](https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1214) by the same author.
- **v3.7.4 x86_64 / Box64 preload-free rework** — also by **[TideGear](https://github.com/TideGear)**, contributed as [PR #91 "Make Vibration Fix Compatible With x86_64 Containers"](https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub/pull/91). The PR was closed on 2026-05-16 after its code was adopted directly into BannerHub with TideGear's explicit permission.
- AI Frame Generation engine by the **GameHub team**; the v3.7.3 GOG reliability overhaul ported from [`utkarshdalal/GameNative`](https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative). All v3.7.x features remain active.

**Please go support GameNative: https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative**

## Community Game Configs

The in-app Community Game Configs browser currently serves **1,321 games** with **4,840 device-specific configs** contributed by the community.

## Installation

See https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub#installation for CPU/variant selection and step-by-step setup.

---

For the v3.7.0 baseline (AI Frame Generation menu, PC Vibration / Rumble) see the [v3.7.0 release notes](https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub/releases/tag/v3.7.0); for the GOG multi-CDN overhaul + FrameGen onResume fix see [v3.7.3](https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub/releases/tag/v3.7.3).

releases.name: Bannerhub v3.7.3
releases.body: > [!WARNING] > **Only install official stable releases** (like this one). Do NOT install pre-releases or raw CI artifacts — pre-release builds use a different package name (`com.tencent.ig`) and cannot be upgraded to stable without uninstalling first. > [!IMPORTANT] > **Notification permission required.** BannerHub will prompt for the **Post Notifications** permission when you start your first Epic, GOG, or Amazon download. You must allow it to receive download progress and completion notifications. Without it, you will not be notified when downloads finish or fail. > [!IMPORTANT] > **Files access required for SD card storage.** To save games to your SD card, BannerHub must be granted the **Files and Media** permission. Go to **Android Settings → Apps → BannerHub → Permissions → Files and media** and set it to **Allow management of all files** (or equivalent on your device). Without this permission the SD card toggle will have no effect. ## What's new in v3.7.3 Two independent reliability fixes, both device-confirmed. ### 1. GOG downloads — multi-CDN failover + resumable PARTIAL state GOG ships every depot through several CDN endpoints — typically `cdn.gog.com`, `gog-cdn-fastly.gog.com`, `gog-cdn-akamai.gog.com`, and a couple of region-specific mirrors. Up until v3.7.2 BannerHub picked one and abandoned the whole download if that CDN returned 403 / 404 / 5xx on a single file. v3.7.3 fixes this top-to-bottom. - **Automatic failover.** Each file probes every CDN advertised in the depot manifest in order; the first one that succeeds wins. A single bad endpoint no longer kills the install. - **CDN picker on the install dialog.** A new "CDN" row sits alongside size and storage on the install-confirm dialog. Leave it on **Auto** (default) for round-robin failover, or pin a specific CDN if your network plays better with one — useful when an ISP throttles a particular hostname or when GOG's own routing sends you to a degraded edge. - **↻ Refresh button.** Tap the refresh icon on the picker to re-fetch the live CDN list from GOG without dismissing the dialog. Use this if you opened the dialog, walked away for a while, and CDNs have rotated. - **PARTIAL install state.** When a download is interrupted (cancel, kill, OOM, network drop), BannerHub now records `gog_state_=PARTIAL` with the in-flight file index + byte offset. Re-tapping install picks up from the same point instead of starting over. All three GOG UIs (library list, library grid, game-detail dialog) now share one install-state model — the checkmark / Add Game / Resume affordances are consistent everywhere. - **Diagnostic toast.** When a file does fail across every CDN, the error toast now names the file, the last CDN tried, and the HTTP code. The same line is also appended to `bh_gog_debug.txt` (in your app's external files directory) so you can copy-paste an exact failure into a bug report. **Device-confirmed during pre-release testing:** POSTAL 2 (multi-CDN fallback survived a single-CDN failure mid-install), Citadel Remonstered (468/468 files clean on Auto), CDN picker UI, ↻ Refresh button. ### 2. AI Frame Generation — resume reliability + cleaner gear dialog Three issues from v3.7.0 / v3.7.1 / v3.7.2 are addressed in one bundle. - **Frame-gen no longer "lies" after resume.** Previously, the `gamescope.control` bytes were only written on first launch. Pressing Home or locking the screen and resuming the game left the sidebar switch saying **ON** while the AI overlay was silently dead — your FPS would drop back to native without the switch ever changing state. The launch hook now also runs on `WineActivity.onResume`, so the overlay survives every backgrounding cycle. If the sidebar switch says ON, AI frame generation is **actually on**. - **Gear icon hides when the switch is OFF.** The gear button next to the sidebar switch now defaults to hidden and only appears when AI Frame Generation is enabled. Matches the existing pattern used by RTS controls in the same sidebar. - **Dialog cleanup — game view stays visible.** The settings dialog no longer paints a full-screen black background over your game. It now uses Android's translucent dim with the game rendering live underneath at 60% dim, the same way native system dialogs look. The dialog has three controls — Preset slider, Custom flow scale slider, and a blue **Close** button — and tap-outside also dismisses. The multiplier picker is gone (it was always 2× on tested hardware anyway; the value is now hardcoded) and the redundant in-dialog Enable switch is gone (the sidebar switch is the single source of truth). Net result: faster to operate, easier on the eyes, no behavior loss. ## Upgrading - **v3.7.2 → v3.7.3:** install the matching variant directly over your existing install. No certificate change, no data loss. GOG library + install state are preserved (`bh_gog_prefs` keys are forward-compatible — old completed installs read as `INSTALLED`, no migration needed). FrameGen settings (`bh_framegen.xml`) carry over; the removed `multiplier` key is simply ignored. - **v3.7.1 or earlier → v3.7.3:** install normally. If the signing certificate differs, uninstall first. - Variants with different package names cannot replace each other in-place. ## Credits - **GOG download reliability overhaul** ported from upstream [`utkarshdalal/GameNative`](https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative): multi-CDN [PR #1220](https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1220) + [PR #1219](https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1219) by **Utkarsh Dalal** (with co-author **Jeremy Bernstein** on #1219), CDN picker [PR #1215](https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1215) by **Bart Zaalberg**, install-state PARTIAL [PR #1277](https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1277) by **Joshua Tam**. - **AI Frame Generation onResume + dialog cleanup** ported from [Bannerhub-Lite PR #5](https://github.com/The412Banner/Bannerhub-Lite/pull/5) by **[teldommm](https://github.com/teldommm)**. - All v3.7.0 features (AI Frame Generation engine itself by the **GameHub team**, PC-accurate Vibration / Rumble by [TideGear](https://github.com/TideGear) via [GameNative PR #1214](https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1214)) remain active. **Please go support GameNative: https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative** --- For details on the v3.7.0 baseline (AI Frame Generation menu, PC Vibration / Rumble), see the [v3.7.0 release notes](https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub/releases/tag/v3.7.0). For the v3.7.1 / v3.7.2 upgrade-prompt stubs, see the [v3.7.1](https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub/releases/tag/v3.7.1) and [v3.7.2](https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub/releases/tag/v3.7.2) release notes.

releases.name: Bannerhub v3.7.2
releases.body:
> [!WARNING]
> **Only install official stable releases** (like this one). Do NOT install pre-releases or raw CI artifacts — pre-release builds use a different package name (`com.tencent.ig`) and cannot be upgraded to stable without uninstalling first.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Notification permission required.** BannerHub will prompt for the **Post Notifications** permission when you start your first Epic, GOG, or Amazon download. You must allow it to receive download progress and completion notifications. Without it, you will not be notified when downloads finish or fail.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Files access required for SD card storage.** To save games to your SD card, BannerHub must be granted the **Files and Media** permission. Go to **Android Settings → Apps → BannerHub → Permissions → Files and media** and set it to **Allow management of all files** (or equivalent on your device). Without this permission the SD card toggle will have no effect.

## Hotfix for v3.7.1

**This is a hotfix release.** No new features. All v3.7.1 functionality (and everything earlier) is preserved.

### What changed

**The launch-time auto-update dialog no longer probes upstream GameHub either.**

v3.7.1 stubbed the *manual* upgrade probe — the Settings → About → "Check Update" row. But there is a **second** call site for the same upgrade endpoint: an auto-fired dialog that pops on every cold start, routed through `ApkUpdateUtils.checkUpdate` rather than the Settings row. In v3.7.1 that auto-dialog was still asking GameHub's servers for an upgrade on every launch, getting back 6.0.1 / `versionCode 110`, and offering it to the user — i.e. offering to replace BannerHub with stock GameHub.

v3.7.2 closes the second mouth. The same singleton (`AppUpgradeRepo.b()`) is now neutralised at *both* call sites with the same anchor-patch shape — its suspend invocation is replaced with `const/4 p1, 0x0`, so the result resumes as `null` and the existing "no update" branch (`if-eqz`) is always taken.

In v3.7.2:

- **No upgrade dialog on app launch.** Cold-starting the app no longer pops the GameHub upgrade prompt.
- Settings → About → "Check Update" — unchanged from v3.7.1, still reads **"Already the latest version"** in gray.
- Logcat shows **zero** `getAppUpgradeApk` traffic from either surface.

The patch is one extra 5-instruction smali edit in `ApkUpdateUtils$checkUpdate$1$1.smali`, mirrored across both `build.yml` (stable) and `build-quick.yml` (pre-release). Same singleton as v3.7.1, different inner class. No behavior change for any other surface — login, store, prices, achievements, Steam card, ratings, downloads, AI Frame Generation, Vibration / Rumble, EOS authentication are all untouched.

### Tracking BannerHub updates

Since both in-app upgrade surfaces are now silent, use either:

- **This GitHub repo's [Releases page](https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub/releases)** — watch the repo to get notified
- **[Obtainium](https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium)** — add `https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub` as an app source with **"Reconcile version string with version detected from OS"** enabled

### Upgrading

- v3.7.1 → v3.7.2: install the matching variant directly over your existing install. No certificate change, no data loss.
- v3.7.0 or earlier → v3.7.2: install normally. If the signing certificate differs, uninstall first.
- Variants with different package names cannot replace each other in-place.

### Credits

Hotfix patch developed and tested by [@The412Banner](https://github.com/The412Banner). AI Frame Generation engine (still active from v3.7.0) is the work of the **GameHub team**; PC-accurate Vibration / Rumble (still active from v3.7.0) is from [TideGear's PR #80](https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub/pull/80) via [GameNative PR #1214](https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1214). **Please go support GameNative: https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative**

---

For the full v3.7.0 feature set (AI Frame Generation menu, PC Vibration / Rumble, and everything earlier), see the [v3.7.0 release notes](https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub/releases/tag/v3.7.0). For details on the original (v3.7.1) Check Update row stub, see the [v3.7.1 release notes](https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub/releases/tag/v3.7.1).

releases.name: Bannerhub v3.7.1
releases.body:
> [!WARNING]
> **Only install official stable releases** (like this one). Do NOT install pre-releases or raw CI artifacts — pre-release builds use a different package name (`com.tencent.ig`) and cannot be upgraded to stable without uninstalling first.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Notification permission required.** BannerHub will prompt for the **Post Notifications** permission when you start your first Epic, GOG, or Amazon download. You must allow it to receive download progress and completion notifications. Without it, you will not be notified when downloads finish or fail.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Files access required for SD card storage.** To save games to your SD card, BannerHub must be granted the **Files and Media** permission. Go to **Android Settings → Apps → BannerHub → Permissions → Files and media** and set it to **Allow management of all files** (or equivalent on your device). Without this permission the SD card toggle will have no effect.

## Hotfix for v3.7.0

**This is a hotfix release.** No new features. All v3.7.0 functionality is preserved.

### What changed

**Settings → About → "Check Update" no longer probes upstream GameHub.**

In v3.7.0 the Check Update row auto-fired `POST /upgrade/getAppUpgradeApk` against GameHub's official server when you opened Settings → About. With upstream GameHub now on 6.0.1 / `versionCode 110`, that endpoint started returning a "new version available" pointing at stock GameHub 6.0.1 — and tapping it would have tried to replace BannerHub with stock GameHub from GameHub's CDN.

BannerHub is pinned to the **5.3.5 / `versionCode 78`** base permanently (Steam-card visibility depends on it), so upstream's `versionCode 110` is always going to look like an upgrade to that row. The honest answer is "you are on the latest version of BannerHub for your base" — which is what the row now says, unconditionally.

In v3.7.1:

- Row reads **"Already the latest version"** in gray. No red "New" badge, ever.
- Tap → toast **"You're already on the latest version"**. No download dialog. No network call.
- Logcat shows zero `getAppUpgradeApk` traffic between launch and post-Settings-open.

The patch is a single 5-instruction smali edit in `SettingUpgradeHolder$onBind$1$1.smali`. The suspend call's return value is forced to `null`, so the existing "no update" branch (`if-eqz`) is always taken. Everything else — login, store, prices, achievements, Steam card visibility, ratings, downloads — is completely untouched. All API endpoints continue to flow through whichever API you have selected.

### Tracking BannerHub updates

Since the in-app Check Update row is no longer functional, use either:

- **This GitHub repo's [Releases page](https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub/releases)** — watch the repo to get notified
- **[Obtainium](https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium)** — add `https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub` as an app source with **"Reconcile version string with version detected from OS"** enabled

### Upgrading

- v3.7.0 → v3.7.1: install the matching variant directly over your existing install. No certificate change, no data loss.
- v3.6.x or older → v3.7.1: install normally. If the signing certificate differs, uninstall first.
- Variants with different package names cannot replace each other in-place.

### Credits

Hotfix patch developed and tested by [@The412Banner](https://github.com/The412Banner). AI Frame Generation engine (still active from v3.7.0) is the work of the **GameHub team**; PC-accurate Vibration / Rumble (still active from v3.7.0) is from [TideGear's PR #80](https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub/pull/80) via [GameNative PR #1214](https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative/pull/1214). **Please go support GameNative: https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative**

---

For the full v3.7.0 feature set (AI Frame Generation menu, PC Vibration / Rumble, and everything earlier), see the [v3.7.0 release notes](https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub/releases/tag/v3.7.0).

releases.name: 0.5.3 preview
releases.body:
# 0.5.3 preview

## X360 Mobile — Update

This update introduces setting priority fixes, new UI sound effects, and network compatibility workarounds for offline gameplay.

### Settings Management

* **Configuration Priority**: Fixed the priority order of settings. Game-specific configurations now correctly overwrite global settings as intended.

### UI Improvements

* **Audio Feedback**: Added custom sound effects to the UI. These are designed to evoke the feel of the original console interface while remaining distinct to avoid legal issues.

### Network Compatibility

* **Graceful Fallbacks**: Implemented semantic fixes and function workarounds for titles with online components. Network checks now fail gracefully, allowing games that previously blocked progression to continue in offline mode.

releases.name: 0.5.2 public
releases.body:
# 0.5.2 public

## X360 Mobile — Update

This update focuses on compatibility, UI cleanup, driver handling, Frame Interpolation improvements, and safer Vulkan cache management.

### Compatibility Improvements

* **UBWC Hinting**: Added a UBWC hint to improve compatibility on Android systems such as HyperOS, OneUI, and other customized vendor ROMs.

### UI Improvements

* **UI Fixes**: Several fixes have been made, especially around the hint bar and its buttons.
* **Code Refactoring**: Internal UI code has been refactored to improve consistency, reduce edge cases, and ensure future stability.

### Driver Management Improvements

* **Touch Input**: Driver handling with touch input has been improved.
* **Manual Deletion**: It is now possible to delete a custom driver by long-pressing it.

### Frame Interpolation Improvements

* **Feature Renaming**: “Frame Gen” has been renamed to “Frame Interpolation” to better describe its functionality.
* **Visual Quality**: Quality has been slightly improved, and ghosting during fast scene changes has been fixed.

### Vulkan Cache Improvements

* **Driver Isolation**: Caches are now separated per game and per driver, preventing issues when switching custom drivers.
* **Manual Cleanup**: It is now possible to clear/delete Vulkan caches manually.

releases.name: 0.5.1 public
releases.body:
# X360 Mobile — Update

This update improves game launch diagnostics and adds full SAF library mode support.

## Improved Launch Logging

Game initialization logging is now more detailed, making instant crashes and boot failures easier to investigate.

This should help identify issues related to file access, metadata detection, content loading, configuration, or early startup failures.

## Full SAF Library Mode

SAF library mode is now fully supported.

New features:

- Multi-folder library re-scan through the Android file picker
- Direct launch from `content://` URIs without copying files
- Metadata and Title ID detection for SAF games
- Per-game settings support for SAF-added games

SAF mode is useful on Android systems with stricter file access behavior, such as ColorOS, OxygenOS, OriginOS, and other heavily customized Android builds. **If your current setup already works correctly with standard file access, you may not need to switch to SAF mode.**

## How To Enable SAF

Go to:

`Settings > Emulation > Game File Access`

Then select:

`Android File Picker (SAF)`

releases.name: 0.5 public
releases.body:
# X360 Mobile - First Public Release (v0.5)

Welcome to the very first public release of **X360 Mobile**! This version represents a major milestone in bringing Xbox 360 emulation to the Android platform.

### Highlights & Features
* **Initial Public Launch:** The emulator is now available for public testing.
* **Turnip Driver Support:** Full compatibility with the latest Turnip/Adreno drivers for Snapdragon devices.

### Known Issues
As this is an early build, please expect the following:
* Performance varies significantly depending on the device chipset.
* Some graphical glitches and crashes may occur in specific titles.
* Audio synchronization is still a work in progress.

### Installation
1. Download the **X360_0.5_public.apk** attached below.
2. Ensure you have your own legally dumped game files (ISO/XEX).
3. For best results on Snapdragon, use the an adeguate Turnip driver..

### Special Thanks
A huge thank you to the community for the incredible support during the development phase and for helping us reach this public launch on **May 31, 2026**.

---
*Disclaimer: X360 Mobile is an independent project and is not affiliated with Microsoft or the Xbox brand.*

* Updated Adreno 8xx and "everything else" driver to Mr Purple T28
* Force gmem and nolrz for Snapdragon 8s Gen 3 (Adreno 735) & Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 (Adreno 740)
* Fix for Samsung One UI 7+ Adreno 7xx devices (enable_tp_ubwc_flag_hint=1)
* Use Mr Purple T24 for Snapdragon 7s Gen 3 & 4
* Use 25.3.0 R6 Gmem for Adreno 710 and 720

Drivers added based on tests from all the testing that has happened in the Issues section. Thanks all for your help and bug reports!

releases.name: NetherSX2-Turnip v0.4
releases.body:
* Rewrote the methodology - now uses libadrenotools approach. Will now work fine on Snapdragon Elite/Later Android versions (wasn't before!)
* Will use Elite driver for Dragonwing Q8 (AYN Odin 3)

So if it was not working for you before - it should now.
Thanks to all the testers SubhanHabib, Yuasasa and others who have helped me track down the issues on devices I do not own.

If you do see any issues - please raise an Issue and provide the logs (preferably logcat logs with logcat logging enabled in NetherSX2 (it's in the Advanced section))

releases.name: star 1.3 - UI redesigns, Vegas Engine built in, New FPS Counter, New in-game menu redesign
releases.body: **After a lot of previews, star 1.3 is here. We had some juicy changes made! But first of all, credits!** - @jacojayy: All of the changes, excluding the Vegas work. - @leegao: Helping in Vegas. It was a pleasure to work and chat with you, hope we will do it again in the future! - @isygold: Developing Vegas ### NOTE - The Vegas FrameGen still doesnt work. - When installing Proton / Wine versions, do not panic. It will install over time, just wait! ## Changelog - Redesigned the in-game ui: - The in-game ui menu now has a modern and sleek look, making the experience way more fresh and easier. - Redesigned FPS Counter - The FPS Counter is now horizontal by default and can be customized via the in game menu. - Integrated Vegas into star. - Removed contents tab: - Contents can now be installed directly in the container / shortcut settings. - Revamped shortcut tab - Made the shortcut image size 2:3 - Removed the appearance tab to make the experience less buggy - Defaulted the theme to AMOLED. - Added the OneUI / HyperOS fix to the Wrapper settings. - There is no need to choose a custom Turnip version or put the enviroment variable. Just enable the toggle! - Contents download speed has been made slightly faster.

releases.body:
## Changelog (Based on Official v11 Final)

---

### **Drive Path Update**
* **Path Migration:** Changed `drive E` to `drive K` for `installed_components`.
* **Manual Installation:** Supported manual copying of components directly to `drive K\installed_components\`.

### **System & Environment**
* **Automated Symlink:** Mapped `C:\users` to `Z:\home\Ajay_drive\users` to prevent save data loss when switching containers.
* **Environment Variables:** Added some env variables.
* **Box64rc Optimization:** Updated config for trainer compatibility and added "trainer" keyword logic for auto-application.

### **Quick Access (Start Menu)**
* **Components Downloader:** Added GUI app for one-click downloads of **Box64**, **Turnip**, **DXVK** etc. (Improved error handling in hotfix)
* **Latest box64rc Downloader:** Added option to download the latest **Ajay.box64rc** instantly.
---
#### Note : Don't Change drive K path.
---

## 📁 Necessary Components and Tools

### ✅ [D3D Local tzst Files Collection](https://github.com/ajay9634/PcEmuFiles-Hub/releases/tag/D3D_tzst)  
### ⚙️ [Ajay Prefix Pro](https://github.com/ajay9634/Ajay-prefix) 

---

releases.name: Winlator 11 beta v3.1 mod Ajay
releases.body:
### Changelog

* **Drive path Update:** Changed drive E path to drive K for installed_components , You can copy box64,  turnip etc to drive K.
* **Automated Setup:** Implemented automatic configuration for SymLink folders and required dependencies.
* **Environment Variables:** Added new environment variables for improved configuration.
* **Start Menu:** Added an automatic update check feature to the Start Menu.
* **Box64rc:** Updated `box64rc` specifically for trainer compatibility.

---

### Final Update
* **SymLink Fix:** Resolved an issue causing the SymLink process to repeat unnecessarily.
* **Autorun.exe:** The application now runs without a console window.
* **Bug Fixes:** General stability improvements and minor bug resolutions.

### How to run ajau3 Script for downloading latest dxvk and turnip etc ?
Just install Ajay Prefix Pro then double click on it.
Requirements : Drive K should be mounted of this path -  `/data/data/com.winlator/files`

### How to run the trainer with game performance presets?
Simply include the word **"trainer"** in the filename of your game trainer or Cheat Engine application.

### Winlator.Ajay.Components.Downloader.ajau3 -
this program can be run after installing Ajay Prefix Pro. It can download latest installable components (box64 , turnip , wined3d , dxvk , vkd3d etc).

---
*Note: This release focuses exclusively on streamlining and automating the setup process. Do not close the container if any of the following processes are active in Task Manager: autorun.exe, cmd.exe, wget.exe, xcopy.exe, or 7z.exe.*

releases.name: Winlator 9 Proot Ajay v3
releases.body:
### Changelog -

- Updated Installable Components path (Box64, Turnip, etc.)
- Bugs fixed

#### Note  -
This is a clone app. It can be installed alongside the official latest Winlator.

### What's special about Winlator PRoot build -
It uses the latest Wine from Kron4ek, but without the XInput patch.This is the final PRoot-based build.It can be useful for running older PC games.The latest Box64 version is not included in this build.

### Note about Upcoming Winlator Updates  -
If a major improvement is released in the official Winlator or if I need to create a backup. Currently, there is no need to modify the latest official Winlator as it is already well-optimized — simply install Ajay Prefix Pro.

releases.name: hakuX 0.3.1
releases.body:
## hakuX v0.3.1

### Performance
- Fix significant FPS regression on "lower-end" devices (Adreno < 740)
- Proper BC3 support
- Multiple tweaks to texture cache, significant improvements on titles such as Forza Motorsport

### Bug Fixes
- Fix BC3/DXT5 texture corruption on 3D textures
- Fix XISO converter not producing valid output — replaced Rust xdvdfs with C extract-xiso

### Diagnostics
- Persistent log capture across sessions — logs survive app restart, previous session preserved

releases.name: hakuX 0.3.0
releases.body:
# hakuX v0.3.0

## Performance
- GPU overhead reduction: batched surface downloads, eliminated redundant image transitions, no-op transition guard
- Texture cache doubled and made configurable — fixes texture pop-in in open-world games
- Native BC1/BC2 compressed texture upload; GPU compute DXT5 decompression
- NV2A fast-path expansion for high-frequency methods
- VkSampler cache, NEON blit optimization, optimized descriptor management

## Stability
- Fix 30fps trap — games no longer get stuck at half speed after temporary drops
- Fix pipeline exhaustion crash, surface eviction corruption, XISO conversion issues
- Fix RCU crash on quick restart, NOP assert, shader binding crash
- Xbox kernel crash detection with diagnostic output

## Audio
- Audio subsystem aligned with X1 BOX

## Texture Modding
- Dump game textures as PNG for texture pack creation

## Settings & UI & Networking
- Per-game settings with visual override highlighting
- Configurable texture cache size, skip occlusion queries, skip boot animation
- Xbox dashboard management, EEPROM editor, Insignia networking (ported from X1 BOX)
- Debug log export

## Known issues:
- Some games are broken on both hakuX and X1 BOX, like Night Caster. This is under investigation and probably related to something fundamental in the initial porting to Android
- Fable has fundamental issues made worse by some of the optimizations on hakuX. While probing the root cause added a disgusting skip.

releases.name: hakuX 0.2.1
releases.body:
## hakuX v0.2.1

### Bug Fixes
- **Mitigates HDD corruption** — restore block device flush on app terminate and background to persist QCOW2 metadata
- **Fix game freeze on TB flush** — disable post-flush rewarm on Android which could hang on self-modified code
- **Fix on-screen controller hidden on some devices** — filter out virtual/internal devices (accelerometers, gyroscopes)

### Improvements
- **Simplified FPS overlay** — shows only FPS count

releases.name: hakuX 0.2.0
releases.body:
## hakuX v0.2.0

### New Features
- **OpenGL ES renderer** — experimental alternative to Vulkan, selectable in Graphics settings (ported from X1 BOX)
- **EEPROM editor** — change Xbox language, video standard, resolution modes, aspect ratio, refresh rate (ported from X1 BOX)
- **Settings index** — reorganized into 4 sections: hakuX Data, Graphics, Debug, EEPROM
- **System file pickers** — change MCPX ROM, Flash ROM, HDD image from settings
- **HDD export** — save a copy of the Xbox HDD to any folder
- **Games folder in settings** — moved from library screen to settings
- **Game search** — search bar with live filtering in game library
- **Pull-to-refresh** — swipe down to rescan games folder
- **XISO progress bar** — real progress tracking across copy/convert/save phases

### Improvements
- **Controller overlay** — D-pad/stick repositioned, LS/RS as separate buttons, menu button, swipe-up gesture, trigger axis fix (-1.0 for release), per-pointer tracking  (ported from X1 BOX)
- **Pause menu** — actually pauses emulation, simplified UI
- **NEON optimizations** — S3TC decompression and texture swizzle (benefits both renderers)

### Bug Fixes
- Fix TB cache crash when FP settings change between sessions
- Fix pause/resume not working from in-game menu
- Fix GLES geometry shader crash (gl_PointSize unavailable without extension)
- Fix GLES shader version detection (was hardcoded to 320, now auto-detected)
- Fix shader link failure crash (graceful fallback instead of assert)
- Fix shared GLSL changes breaking VK (gated behind renderer check)

releases.name: dev7
releases.body:
IMPORTANT NOTICE
preinstalled FEXCore 2505 might fail to load on some devices use the 2508.1 wcp instead till I hotfix it tommrow.


### Release Notes

* Merged branch 'winlator_bionic' from pipetto-crypto into 'winlator_bionic_dev5'.
* Refactored 'ContainerDetailFragment' to partially fix setupDXWrapper logic.
* Updated v762 and v805 to v819.
* Added required variables to 'GuestProgramLauncherComponent' to disable the proton mediaconverter plugin.
* 'ContainerDetailFragment': Recreated config if wrapper version is empty.
* Defaulted to 'turnip25.1.0' on supported devices.
* 'Vulkan': Minor refactoring.
* 'GraphicsDriverConfigDialog': Blacklisted unsupported drivers.
* 'DXVKConfigDialog': Blacklisted 'arm64ec dxvk' on non 'arm64ec' containers.
* Removed non-necessary assets.
* 'GLRenderer': Added 'force fullscreen' option.
* Fixed background selection in container settings.
* 'StorageInfoDialog': Refactored.
* Removed unused 'RestoreActivity' class.
* Removed all code related to the 'SaveManager'.
* Removed the option to export containers.
* Removed the option to import containers.
* 'SettingsFragment': Removed backup and restore data options.
* Assets: Fixed wrong 'aarch64 dlls'.
* Removed all references to 'Winlator 7.1.2' legacy input mode.
* 'VKD3DVersionItem': Does not force version on assets files.
* Removed 'TerminalActivity' and all related code.
* 'Vulkan': Minor refactoring.
* Deleted saves, the magnifier, and screen effects.
* Changed shortcut text color to white.
* Defaulted background key press to shortcut list like the start page.
* Brought back container icons.

releases.name: Steamlator 1.7
releases.body: Split controls into two tabs: - Sensor - Gamepad In the Gamepad tab, visual gamepad button display was added. Added the **Controller Manager** button (similar to the Winlator Cmod implementation) Added support for custom icons (2 formats available: full white mode / original color mode) Added 2 new control types: - radial-menu (like in Winlator 11) - swipe-pad (allows button input using swipe gestures ← → ↑ ↓) Added visual feedback when pressing almost all button types. Added the **Quick HUD** function to container settings. It allows quick access to: - controls - keyboard Added a new **Device** tab where you can view: - CPU name - RAM usage Added **Open WineCFG** and **Open Regedit** buttons to container settings (these become available after container creation) This allows opening these programs directly inside the container in vertical mode. Now after container creation, it is possible to change the Wine / Proton version. Fixed loading of Box64 versions from Content. Added versions 0.42 and others to the **WoWBox64** tab. Added Wine versions: - 9.7 - 8.2 Added the ability to download Turnip drivers online in the **Adreno-tools** tab (from the K11MCH1 repository) Now Wine / Proton downloaded from Content will be located in: `Z:\opt` Updated the **Toggle Fullscreen** button Before: - simply stretched the canvas to 100% Now: - allows manual stretch adjustment while keeping screen borders Added a gear icon on the right side of **WineD3D**, where settings from Wine Configuration were moved. Added language switching in **Settings** New language added: - Spanish Fixed the visual freeze at 76% during ImageFS installation. Added log output during: - ImageFS installation - container startup Added clipboard copy support in the **Logs (Wine Debug)** tab. Added a new **Limit FPS** tab. Added the **export** folder inside assets which allows loading data into: `Z:\export` # Box64 / Turnip Updates Box64 0.42 Turnip 26.0 R8 / 26.0 R8 GMEM

releases.name: Steamlator 1.5.2
releases.body:
🏗 Based on Winlator Just Bionic 1.5.2


🚀 Key Changes

Steam is built into the APK – when you launch the container, the Steam launcher opens automatically.
    
![photo_5792158196801063468_y](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/37e5ab07-da9e-4051-b1ba-339b44e0e50e)

Uses special launch arguments for maximum compatibility.

Verified: Steam runs on devices with Helio G99 and Snapdragon 665
(devices with more powerful processors will work as well).
    
Steamlator includes all the features of Winlator Just Bionic 1.5.2, including:

 Support for importing .wcp files

All functionality of the original Winlator Just Bionic

🖥 Windows Application Support

Steamlator uses Proton + Box64 to run Windows applications.

You can also install Wine via:
 Contents → select version 9.2 or 9.16.

🎮 DXVK Updates

Added DXVK 2.6.1 and Glansync

Added DXVK 2.7

Older DXVK versions are still available

New FPS limit options added: 25 FPS and 35 FPS

🌍 Localization

The Steamlator interface now includes:

English language 

Russian language 

Ukrainian language 
        
❓ Why use Steamlator
-- | --
🔗 Access to online games | ✅ Yes
📦 Download mods directly from Steam Workshop | ✅ Yes
🧩 Full-featured Steam client | ✅ Yes
📁 Games download to the Download folder and can be launched on any emulator | ✅ Yes
🔄 Save synchronization with PC | ✅ Yes
🚫 Conflicts with Winlator | ❌ No

releases.name: Winlator bionic ref4ik mod v9
releases.body:
## Winlator Mod bionic — ref4ik v9

**What's New in This Version:**

- Added support for animated covers for games

- Added Relative Mouse option from the container to the control settings

- Added the ability to set a custom icon for a game

- Added BCn settings from implementation Winlator Bionic @Pipetto-crypto

- Improved File Explorer — now you can create a game shortcut directly from it

- Interface changes: moved menus, "Installed Components" section, and Gamepad Test

- Removed Big Picture menu from the project and cleaned up other unused code

- Created a new SystemSensorPaths class - that contains all paths to the device's system sensors and centralized all sensor queries 

- Replaced the GL renderer with a Vulkan renderer. Old GL effects were removed, all effects were ported to custom Vulkan fragment shaders; added a Vulkan post-processing pipeline.
The Vulkan renderer implementation is based on Winlator Ludashi @StevenMXZ

- Added new sensor paths: hwmon/MTK

- Added content provider selection in Contents (ref4ik, the412banner, and the ability to add your own custom provider)

- Added "Box/FEX Extreme" preset

- When enabling Toggle Fullscreen , the sharpness effect is now automatically enabled to improve image qualit

- Fixed translations

- Added a slider in container settings to change text DPI


<details>
<summary>← Click here to view full previous changelog</summary>

### Previous Major Updates

🟣 Fixed FPS counter  
🟣 Fixed error in driver loading menu  
🟣 Removed limitation — now all Turnip drivers are shown in every repository (not just the first 10)  
🟣 **AdrenoTools**: added option to export downloaded driver to device storage  
🟣 Added option to hide FEX/Box config files when one is selected  
🟣 Game shortcut icons now load from **Steam**  
🟣 **Adreno Settings**: added initial parameters (work in progress)  
🟣 Integrated **AdrenoTools Store** for extended driver functionality  
🟣 Introduced **Wrapper v2** — improved driver selection UI  
🟣 Added fast **WFM** implementation from de0ver  
🟣 Added full **Russian** language support  
🟣 Reworked input controls settings:  
  → Now you can add custom icons to controls  
  → Go to control profile editor → select icons → apply  
  → Long-press icon to remove  
🟣 Added modular **FPS counter** in xservermenu (select parameters & save config)  
🟣 Updated Task Manager: added GPU and battery temperature indicators  
🟣 Changed application color scheme  
🟣 FPS counter: fixed bugs + added dimming option  
🟣 Input controls: added slider for custom icon size  
🟣 Fixed crash when adding Wine Proton  
🟣 **Active Windows**: now you can open/close running programs (UI/functionality to be improved later)  
🟣 Added built-in **File Manager**  
🟣 New screen effects  
🟣 Some FEX-related changes  
🟣 Ported components from 0.3.7.1 (Fex2508–2509)  
🟣 Partially updated app theme  
🟣 Fixed multiple bugs  
🟣 Changes in graphics driver handling  
🟣 Added **ALSA reflector**  
🟣 Fixed frame rate issues  
🟣 Updated image installer  
🟣 Added gamepad detection  
🟣 Added URL content support  
🟣 Big **"Putre"** button for quick game settings  
🟣 Moved preset frame parameters into container  
🟣 Added more options in graphics driver settings  
🟣 Added hotkey-based manual export  
🟣 Fixed wallpaper adding  
🟣 Fixed fullscreen mode  
🟣 Fixed hotkey settings  
🟣 Increased custom icon limit: 27 → 1000  
🟣 Fixed conflict with simultaneous Termux installation  
🟣 Control settings: added option to disable button outline + transparency slider  
🟣 Various design improvements  
🟣 Significantly improved Active Windows behavior  
🟣 Greatly improved manual shortcut import  
🟣 Added **FEX** preset  
🟣 Added ability to install Windows components  
🟣 Added DXVK & Turnip download into container  
🟣 Added audio driver settings  
🟣 Improved FPS counter: new design, draggable, more size options  
🟣 Added FPS limiter  
🟣 Added app language selector in settings  
🟣 Added Box/FEX/etc. buttons for hotkey preset creation  
🟣 Added import/export for Box (.boxx) and FEX (.fexx) presets
- Added my custom modified **WFM**  
- Added ability to download **Wine** directly into the container  
- Updated **Content Manager**  
- Updated **Credits & Acknowledgements** section  
- Fixed multiple issues in translations  
- Added **Voltage** parameter to the FPS counter  
- Fixed various bugs in the FPS counter  
- Interface improvements and polishing   
- Added Chinese language  
- Added a new HDR effect to screen effects  
- Improved active windows  
- Fixed control settings  
- Fixed some bugs in themes  
- Fixed some minor bugs 
- - Added the ability to add your own custom repository with drivers in Adrenotools

- Added gyroscope control

- Added update check

- Fixed some bugs

- Added download buttons for Box and FEX in the container and in the shortcut settings

- Added import and export of container settings configuration

- Updated DXVK settings

- Added a file manager for the container

- Added animation selection

- Added GPU load parameter and frame time graph to the FPS counter

- Added pause functionality when minimizing the app (the container is no longer destroyed, but paused instead)

**Removed Features:**  
- Magnifier  
- Touch helper function  

**Minor Optimizations:** Various small performance and smoothness improvements.

- Viewing and removing shared installed components

- Fixed touch control disappearing after 5 seconds #9 

- Fixed downloading and caching of game covers

- Fixed UI bugs

- Improved on-screen controls editor

- Added frame generation from If the frame generator does not work on the first container launch, try restarting the container.

- Updated FPS counter

- Added experimental Steam games launch

- Fixed a bug when downloading Wine where other versions stopped working #4 

- Rebuilt some Wine ref4ik versions with additional patches

- Fixed API output in the FPS counter and added GPU temperature indicator.

- Fixed black screen on first container boot.

- Improved shortcuts.

- Improved frame generation.

- Improved game import menu

- Added FSR effect.

- Added profiling for the selected game.

- Added control profile preview.

- Fixed a bug when importing Wine with x86_64 architecture where nothing would 
launch inside Wine.

- Improved XServer.

- Added Quick Panel.

- Improved Task Manager.

</details>

**Version information:**

- **Lite version** — regular/standard signature: `com.winlator.ref4ik`  
- **Lud version** — APK signature of the benchmark for locking processor frequencies at maximum: `com.ludashi.benchmark`  


**Join  community and get the latest news, builds, and discussions:**  
👉 **Telegram Channel:** https://t.me/winlatorruu  

**If you encounter any problems, please report them here: [GitHub lssues](https://github.com/REF4IK/winlator-ref4ik-/issues)**

Please star the project if you like it! ⭐
Your support helps a lot and motivates me to continue development.

releases.name: Winlator~Honkon v11
releases.body:
### VERSION WINLATOR V11 MOD

***Esta versión sigue siendo básica pero trae algunas mejoras en general y otras más específicas para dispositivo mediatek,gpu mali y gpu xclipse.***

### _registro_ _de_ _cambios_

•Todo los cambios de la versión oficial de Bruno.
•Se agregó el menu de contenido de la versión afeimod(creditos y agradecimiento).
•Traduje gran parte de la interfaz a español además de cambiar el logo y tema.
•Se cambió el directorio de donde se descarga el contenido,esto para agregar DXVK parcheado como stripped o sarek para mayor compatibilidad con vulkan 1.1 o 1.2 con pocas extenciones disponibles, también se agregaron varios wined3d para descargar.
•Se agregaron varías variables en la configuración de box64 para mayor rendimiento y compatibilidad.
•Se agregaron parches para el rendimiento y compatibilidad.
•se agregaron complemento necesario para distintos títulos funcionen correctamente.
•se agregaron distintas variables para rendimiento, compatibilidad y estabilidad.

releases.name: Winlator~honkon v10.1
releases.body: ### vortek+DXVK ya funciona en gpu mali Esta versión sigue siendo básica pero trae algunas mejoras en general y otras más específicas para dispositivo mediatek,gpu mali y xclipse,más adelante subiré una versión completa :) AVISO:vortek no funciona en todo los dispositivos con mediatek,esto debido a varios factores lo cuales son driver, versión de vulkan ,extenciones etc... Bruno trabajo arduamente para mejorar la compatibilidad y rendimiento de winlator en dispositivos con gpu mali y xclipse. ### Registro de cambios: 1- se uso la versión de afie mod como inspiración,créditos y agradecimiento.. Aquí la versión por si la quieren probar [mod afei](https://github.com/afeimod/winlator-mod/releases/tag/10.0-Amod5fix) 1.1• se elimino la opción de comandos y traduje la opción para agregar contenido... Tenga en cuenta que algunas cajas y controladores deben instalarse con wine9.16.whp antes de poder usarse,está opción solo es para pruebas, por favor apoya al autor original. 2•Se cambió el directorio de donde se descarga el contenido,esto para agregar DXVK parcheado como stripped o sarek para mayor compatibilidad con vulkan 1.1 o 1.2 con pocas extenciones disponibles, también se agregaron varios wined3d para descargar. 3•Se agregaron parches para el rendimiento y compatibilidad. 4•se agregaron complemento necesario para distintos títulos funcionen correctamente. 5•se agregaron distintas variables para rendimiento, compatibilidad y estabilidad.

releases.name: Winlator~honkon v10
releases.body:
•"vortek+DXVK ya funciona en gpu mali"

•"Esta es una versión básica,solo agregué el contenido de winlator v9~honkon más algunas novedades,más adelante subiré una versión completa" :)

•Se cambió el directorio de donde se descarga el contenido,esto para agregar DXVK parcheado como stripped o sarek para mayor compatibilidad con vulkan 1.1 o 1.2 con pocas extenciones disponibles, también se agregaron varios wined3d para descargar.
•Se agregaron parches para el rendimiento y compatibilidad.
•se agregaron complemento necesario para distintos títulos funcionen correctamente.
•se agregaron distintas variables para rendimiento, compatibilidad y estabilidad=
BOX64_FPU_MODE=1 
MESA_NO_DITHER=1
BOX64_SKIP_SIGSEGV=1
BOX64_DYNAREC_DIRTY=1

releases.name: Winlator~honkon 9
releases.body:
•"Esta es una versión básica, solo agregué el contenido de winlator v8~honkon,más adelante subiré una versión completa"  :)

•Se agregaron wined3d en las configuraciones del container,se recomienda entrar con el wined3d por default al crear el container para evitar errores.
•Se cambió el directorio de donde se descarga el contenido.
•Se dejó la opción de DXVK,esto para los usuarios Mali que soporten vortek.
•Se agregaron parches para el rendimiento y compatibilidad.
•se subió una sola versión que será "benchmark",esto para mayor rendimiento pero no interfiere con otras versión de winlator.

releases.name: Winlator v8.0 R1~Honkon
releases.body:
Registro de cambios

•Se aplicaron los cambios de la versión anterior "winlator~honkon v8"
•Se eliminaron algunos Wined3d y complementos para reducir el peso del apk.
• algunas correcciones,mejoras en el rendimiento y compatibilidad.
•se subió una sola versión que será "bench",esto para mayor rendimiento pero no interfiere con otras versión de winlator.

releases.name: Winlator_Brasil_10.1, Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI e Winlator Brasil CLT
releases.body:
### 🆕 Winlator_Brasil_10.1, Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI e Winlator Brasil CLT – Novas Versões

Esta atualização traz duas versões, **Winlator Brasil 10.1**, **Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI** e **Winlator Brasil CLT**. 

**Permitindo instalar as 3 versões ao mesmo tempo, no seu celular**.

![Screenshot_2025-05-28-13-46-30-893_com miui home](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/11ae82c8-c174-425a-909d-0aa1b31db7f5)


---

O **Winlator Brasil 10.1** traz diversas melhorias e recursos adicionais para aprimorar sua experiência com jogos no Android. 

O **Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI** traz diversas melhorias e um desempenho melhor de gameplay e áudio.

O **Winlator Brasil CLT** é focado apenas em programas de trabalho do dia a dia.

--- 

Confira abaixo todas as novidades e instruções detalhadas.

---

- **NOTA:** Para utilizar o **Winlator Brasil 10.1**, você precisa desinstalar a versão original do Winlator ou Winlator Bionic ou qualquer Winlator associado ao nome do Winlator, se você já o possuía para poder instalar este mod. Ou, caso contrário, você não pode instalar este mod porque este mod é usado glibc e glibc não são suportados o nome personalizado para clonar o apk como benchmark ou qualquer outro nome.

---

### ✅ Novidades da Versão **Winlator Brasil 10.1**

- **📦 Pacote AIO Visual C++**. Instalação automática de todas as versões do Visual C++ Redistributable.
- **🌐 Novo Navegador Web**: Inclusão de um navegador leve para facilitar downloads e navegação.
- **🗜️ WinRAR**. Ferramenta de compactação/descompactação adicionada.
- **🎮 Perfis de Controles de Jogos**: Agora com 92 perfis disponíveis para download automático.

Veja como baixar os perfis de controle automaticamente:

![Download de Perfis](https://github.com/winlatorbrasil/Winlator-Brasil/blob/main/android_alsa/controle.gif )

- **📦 Instalação Offline do Wine Gecko e Mono**: Facilita a execução de aplicativos .NET e páginas com conteúdo HTML.
- **⚙️ Novas Flags do Box64**: 14 flags adicionadas para otimização e compatibilidade.
- **🌐 Novas Variáveis de Ambiente**: 17 variáveis configuráveis para ajuste fino de desempenho.
- **🇧🇷 Tradução 90% em Português (Brasil)**: Interface mais amigável para usuários brasileiros.
- **🍷 Suporte ao Wine 9.15 e 9.16 (ESTÃO EM BETA AINDA)**: Adição de menu para instalação dessas versões (Wine 10 não suportado).

`PODE ALTERNAR ENTRE AS VERSÕES DA WINE EM UM MESMO CONTAINER, SEM PRECISAR CRIAR UM NOVO CONTAINER, ISSO ESTÁ EM BETA TAMBÉM, ERROS PODEM ACONTECER.`

Aprenda a instalar as versões 9.15 e 9.16 do Wine:

![Instalação do Wine](https://github.com/winlatorbrasil/Winlator-Brasil/blob/main/android_alsa/winebug.gif )

- **🧠 Aumento da Memória Virtual**: Agora é possível configurar até 16384MB.
- **🎨 Novos Ícones nos Controles**: Facilita a edição e personalização dos controles.
- **⚡ Aumento do Limite de Taxa de Quadros**: Suporte para até 240 FPS.

---

### ✅ Novidades da Versão **Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI**

- **⚠️ ATENÇÃO AOS DRIVERS**. Ele reconhece até:
 
**Turnip:** 24.3.0
**DXVK:** 2.5.3.0
**BOX:** 0.3.3

- **⚠️ Feito com base no Fork do foxrain versão usada foi a Winlator-9.0-Amod3_LuAi.apk**.
- **📦 Pacote AIO Visual C++**. Instalação automática de todas as versões do Visual C++ Redistributable.
- **🌐 Novo Navegador Web**: Inclusão de um navegador leve para facilitar downloads e navegação.
- **🎮 Perfis de Controles de Jogos**: Agora com 92 perfis disponíveis para download automático.

Veja como baixar os perfis de controle automaticamente:

![Download de Perfis](https://github.com/winlatorbrasil/Winlator-Brasil/blob/main/android_alsa/controle.gif )

- **🗜️ WinRAR**. Ferramenta de compactação/descompactação adicionada.
- **🇧🇷 Tradução 90% em Português (Brasil)**: Interface mais amigável para usuários brasileiros.
- **📦 Instalação Offline do Wine Gecko e Mono**: Facilita a execução de aplicativos .NET e páginas com conteúdo HTML.
- **⚡ Aumento do Limite de Taxa de Quadros**: Suporte para até 240 FPS.
- **🧠 Aumento da Memória Virtual**: Agora é possível configurar até 16384MB.

---

### ✅ Novidades da Versão **Winlator Brasil CLT**

- **⚠️ Feito com base no Fork do WB64DEV versão usada foi a Winlator-9.1.1.apk**.
- **📦 Pacote AIO Visual C++**. Instalação automática de todas as versões do Visual C++ Redistributable.
- **🌐 Novo Navegador Web**: Inclusão de um navegador leve para facilitar downloads e navegação.
- **🗜️ WinRAR**. Ferramenta de compactação/descompactação adicionada.
- **🇧🇷 Tradução 90% em Português (Brasil)**: Interface mais amigável para usuários brasileiros.
- **📦 Instalação Offline do Wine Gecko e Mono**: Facilita a execução de aplicativos .NET e páginas com conteúdo HTML.
- **💻 Instalação LibreOffice**. Instalação do pacote Office Open Source, para edição de arquivos Excel, Word e PowerPoint.
- **🖌️ Instalação Blender**: Instalação do Blender para modelagens 3D.
- **⚡ Aumento do Limite de Taxa de Quadros**: Suporte para até 240 FPS.
- **🧠 Aumento da Memória Virtual**: Agora é possível configurar até 16384MB.

### ⚙️ Explicações Técnicas 

#### 🔧 Flags do Box64 

As flags do Box64 permitem ajustar o comportamento do emulador para melhor compatibilidade e desempenho:

- `BOX64_DYNAREC_SAFEFLAGS`: Ativa flags seguras no recompilador dinâmico para evitar instruções potencialmente problemáticas.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_FASTNAN`: Otimiza operações com valores NaN (Not a Number) para maior velocidade.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_FASTROUND`: Utiliza arredondamento rápido em operações de ponto flutuante.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_X87DOUBLE`: Garante precisão dupla nas operações com o coprocessador x87.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_BIGBLOCK`: Permite blocos maiores de código no recompilador dinâmico, melhorando o desempenho.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_STRONGMEM`: Implementa verificações de memória mais rigorosas para evitar acessos inválidos.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_FORWARD`: Habilita a execução antecipada de instruções para otimização.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_CALLRET`: Otimiza chamadas e retornos de funções.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_WAIT`: Garante sincronização adequada em instruções de espera.
- `BOX64_AVX`: Ativa suporte às instruções AVX para aplicações que as utilizam.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_NATIVEFLAGS`: Utiliza flags nativas do sistema host para melhor desempenho.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_WEAKBARRIER`: Reduz barreiras de memória para melhorar a velocidade, com possível impacto na precisão.
- `BOX64_MAXCPU`: Define o número máximo de CPUs virtuais disponíveis para o emulador.
- `BOX64_UNITYPLAYER`: Otimiza a execução de jogos desenvolvidos com o Unity Player.

#### 🌐 Variáveis de Ambiente 

As variáveis de ambiente permitem configurar aspectos específicos do sistema e do emulador:

- `LC_ALL`: Define a localidade padrão do sistema, afetando formatação de datas, números, etc.
- `ZINK_DESCRIPTORS`: Controla o número de descritores usados pelo driver Zink.
- `ZINK_DEBUG`: Ativa mensagens de depuração para o driver Zink.
- `MESA_SHADER_CACHE_DISABLE`: Desativa o cache de shaders no Mesa.
- `MESA_SHADER_CACHE_MAX_SIZE`: Define o tamanho máximo do cache de shaders.
- `MESA_GLTHREAD`: Ativa o threading no OpenGL para melhorar o desempenho.
- `WINEESYNC`: Habilita o esync no Wine para melhor gerenciamento de threads.
- `TU_DEBUG`: Ativa mensagens de depuração para o driver Turnip.
- `MESA_VK_WSI_DEBUG`: Ativa depuração para a interface de sistema de janelas no Vulkan.
- `MESA_GL_VERSION_OVERRIDE`: Força uma versão específica do OpenGL.
- `DXVK_HUD`: Exibe informações de desempenho na tela durante a execução.
- `GALLIUM_HUD`: Similar ao DXVK_HUD, mas para drivers Gallium.
- `PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC`: Define a latência do PulseAudio em milissegundos.
- `MESA_EXTENSION_MAX_YEAR`: Restringe as extensões do Mesa a um ano específico.
- `IR3_SHADER_DEBUG`: Ativa depuração para shaders no driver Freedreno.
- `WINE_DO_NOT_CREATE_DXGI_DEVICE_MANAGER`: Impede a criação do gerenciador de dispositivos DXGI no Wine.
- `MANGOHUD`: Ativa a sobreposição do MangoHud para monitoramento de desempenho.

---

### 📥 Instruções de Instalação

1. Instale o APK do **Winlator Brasil 10.1** normalmente no seu dispositivo Android.
2. Execute o aplicativo e aguarde a criação das pastas iniciais.
3. Acesse o menu de gerenciamento de pacotes para alternar ou baixar novas versões do Box64, Turnip ou DXVK.
4. Aplique os templates de controle nas configurações de mapeamento conforme o jogo desejado.

---

### 🛠️ Possíveis Bugs e Melhorias

⚠️ **Instabilidade com Wine 10**: Atualmente, o Wine 10 não é suportado devido a incompatibilidades conhecidas.  
📉 **Limitações de Desempenho**: Alguns dispositivos podem não atingir os 240 FPS devido a restrições de hardware.  
🌐 **Tradução Incompleta**: Apesar de 90% da interface estar traduzida para o português, algumas partes ainda podem aparecer em inglês.

`Obrigado: [afeimod](https://github.com/afeimod/) pelo seu belo trabalho em relação ao menu de drivers.`

Esta versão do **Winlator Brasil 10.0** (fork baseado no projeto de Bruno Dev) inclui uma ampla variedade de versões do **Box64**, **Turnip**, **DXVK** e dezenas de templates de controle otimizados para jogos populares.

---

**NOTA:** Você precisa desinstalar a versão original do Winlator ou Winlator Bionic ou qualquer Winlator associado ao nome do Winlator, se você já o possuía para poder instalar este mod. Ou, caso contrário, você não pode instalar este mod porque este mod é usado glibc e glibc não são suportados o nome personalizado para clonar o apk como benchmark ou qualquer outro nome.

---

## 🎮 Templates de controle incluídos

RTS, Template (12 buttons), Hitman 2, Virtual Gamepad, Fallout 3, Far Cry 4,

---

## 🆕 Changelog

- Inclusão de múltiplas versões do Box64, Turnip e DXVK (pré-instaladas e autônomas);  
- Mais de 50 templates de controle personalizados para jogos;  
- Melhor organização para facilitar atualizações e testes de compatibilidade.

---

## 📌 Instruções de instalação

1. Instale o APK do **Winlator Brasil** normalmente no seu dispositivo Android.  
2. Execute o app e aguarde a criação das pastas iniciais.  
3. Acesse a área de gerenciamento de pacotes para alternar ou baixar novas versões de Box64, Turnip ou DXVK.  
4. Aplique os templates de controle nas configurações de mapeamento conforme o jogo desejado.  

---

## 💾 Acesso ao cartão de memória

Para acessar jogos armazenados no cartão de memória, use o app **"Gerenciador de Arquivos"** (disponível gratuitamente na Play Store).  
Nele, vá até o cartão de memória, toque e mantenha pressionada uma pasta até ela ser selecionada.  
Toque em **"Mais"** (no rodapé), vá em **"Propriedades"** e veja o campo **"Pasta"**, que exibirá o caminho completo, por exemplo:  
`/storage/9BD3-F22E/`  
Copie esse caminho e cole na seção **"Drives"** do container no Winlator.

---

## 🎮 Correção de XInput

Para corrigir possíveis bugs no joystick XInput, acesse o menu:  
**Iniciar > Fixes > XInput Fixes > XInput Fix Controller**

---

⚠️ A estabilidade e o desempenho podem variar conforme o dispositivo e a GPU utilizada.

releases.name: ARMSX2 iOS 2.2 Release 2
releases.body:
Added in-game experimental Fast Forward controls to Quick Settings, this may increase device heat while using.

Added new on-screen controller skins and made White Colored the new default.
Preserved the previous default controller skin as Legacy Refresh.

Added skin choices for Black, Black Colored, Black DS, Black White, Full White, White DS, White Full Color Button, Liquid Glass, and Xbox.

Added controller skin selection to Virtual Pad settings, layout editor, and in-game Quick Settings.

Thank you to Bagas on discord for creating the controller skins!

releases.name: ARMSX2 iOS 2.2
releases.body:
Updated OSD/FPS branding to ARMSX2 iOS 2.2.

Fixed controller rumble. 

Improved the ARM64 EE recompiler: GPR cache expansion, const folding, cached loads/stores, branch-likely support, wait-loop handling, full-clamp FPU path, and unaligned load/store native paths. This should improve performance quite a bit. Thank you to @zeruth for assisting.

ARM64: Port x86 iFPUd full clamp mode (eeClampMode=3) for EE FPU, fixes NFS Carbon hang courtesy of @isztldav

releases.name: ARMSX2 MacOS 2.2 Release 1
releases.body:
ARM64: Port x86 iFPUd full clamp mode (eeClampMode=3) for EE FPU, fixes NFS Carbon hang @isztldav 
ARM64: Add cached LQ/SQ fast path to the EE GPR-cache translation layer @jpolo1224 
ARM64: Fold const-known EE ALU ops into the GPR cache as immediate Movs @jpolo1224 

This release further improves the performance on apple devices.
Floating point now also supports mode 3 from x86, adding support for NFS Carbon and potentially other games.

releases.name: ARMSX2 Refresh
releases.body:
ARMSX2 Android Refresh Changelog

Updated emulator core with newer PCSX2 2.7-based changes.

Improved ARM64 JIT behavior and overall performance.

Added recent GameDB/core compatibility fixes.

Improved graphics compatibility for several games.

Added hardware/game-specific fixes from recent refresh work.

Improved MTVU/fastmem behavior where supported.

Better default settings for smoother gameplay.

General stability fixes and cleanup.

Improved cover/game metadata handling.

New UI designed by the wizard @vivimagic that will continue to be improved 

Ongoing work: more EE/VU optimization and game-specific fixes are still planned.

Thank you to @zeruth and @isztldav for the major work done for ARMSX2 refresh! It will only get better from here, please enjoy and provide feedback.

releases.name: ARMSX2 iOS 2.1 Release 4
releases.body:
Major iOS ARM64 performance improvement, including EE/VU JIT work and the VU jump-cache fast path that fixed big slowdowns testers reported.

Improved ARM64 EE register/cache handling and memory translation paths to reduce CPU pressure and device heat.

Fixed RetroAchievements launch crashes when RA was left enabled across app relaunches.

Softcore RA remains usable, Hardcore is disabled/unavailable for now until we get approval from the RA team.

Fixed iOS 18 performance. 

Added iOS 27-specific virtual button fixes.

Added/updated GameDB and hardware-renderer fixes brought over from the Mac-side work.

Reduced hot-path telemetry/device-stat overhead and cached OSD device stats.

Thank you to @isztldav for his contributions

releases.name: Bringing Legacy Into Today 16
releases.body:
### 3D rendering
* Option to add/remove Reshade from shortcut dialog
* Option to force DXGI at Reshade injection
* Reshade automatic installation for DirectX 9 and higher
* Reshade popular community shaders included
* SBS support for windowed and lower resolution apps

### Bug fixes
* Crash when switching tabs fixed
* Do not load XR on unsupported devices
* Quick menu on Quest bigger
* Unsupported "Big Picture Mode" option removed

### Core
* Allow bigger screen distance
* License into the code added
* Option to support 6GB VRAM
* Select 4GB VRAM by default on container creation
* XR code refactor

### Input
* Decrease latency when typing
* Laser gun option added
* Steering wheel emulation added (experimental)

### UI
* Change tab About to More (containing online info)
* Move Adreno GPU drivers under content tab
* Quck menu rearranged
* Quick menu SBS support
* Relative mouse renamed and moved into Controller Manager
* Show controller manager in quick menu

### XR API 0.4
* Additional screen mode with head tracking
* Map haptics events to bHaptics/ProTube accessory
* Send UDP data on multiple ports

releases.name: Almost Ready to Fly 11
releases.body:
### New UI
* Automatically save container/settings
* Hide touch input controls screen
* Hide unsupported shortcut features
* Quick menu size fixed
* Remember previously opened menu screen
* Updated logo/icon
* Use tabs instead of navigation menu

### XR API 0.3
* AER support added
* Disable head->mouse mapping when UDP is running
* Expose immersive and SBS mode
* Incorrectly rounded negative values fixed
* Increase framesync cache length
* Let user control stereo
* Option to enable UDP communication without VR
* Support higher resolutions

### XR Core
* Autoclose the app when there are no windows
* CPU/GPU level and refresh rate options added
* Decrease XR latency
* Do not allow portrait container resolution
* Shortcut resolution option fixed by @bigelod
* Swapchain indexing fixed

### XR Screen features
* Bloom and fake reflection effects added
* Curved screen support
* Screen effects support in XR mode
* Screen zooming added
* Wideangle screen support

### XR Support
* [Flawless Wide Screen](https://www.flawlesswidescreen.org/)
* [OpenTrack WXR](https://github.com/bigelod/opentrackWXR)

Big thanks to @GmoLargey for testing and reporting many bugs during the development.

releases.name: XrAPI 0.2 support added
releases.body:
### XrAPI 0.2 news
* App can set custom FOV
* FOV values are logged when changed
* VR and SBS is now activated by UDP message

releases.name: XrAPI polished for backward compatibility
releases.body:
### XrAPI changes
* Ensure there is enough overlap for late reprojection
* Simplify the API versioning to `major.minor`
* Support for multiple XrAPI versions in one APK
* Updated README with the complete specification
* Version file has to be written by the software using the API

releases.name: WinlatorXR stability hotfix version
releases.body:
### Core updates
* Better way to avoid freezing
* Downloadable content (maintained by @StevenMXZ)
* Restore downloadable contents (by @Pipetto-crypto)
* Set default box preset to performance (recommendation by @GmoLargey)

### Headset support
* CPU/GPU level increased on Quest
* Improved XR performance
* Pico 4 Ultra refresh rate set to 72Hz

### XrAPI changes
* Disable VR when a dialog is shown
* Pico XrAPI haptics fix (by @Tobbe85)
* Support for XrAPI version 0.1.4 adding controller haptics (by @bigelod)
* Support for XrAPI version 0.1.5 share informations about the headset (in Z:\tmp\xr\system)
* XrAPI cleanup (Pixel sweeping removed)

releases.name: GameHub 5.3.5 Lite V1
releases.body:
Ported [GameHub Lite 5.3.3](https://github.com/Producdevity/gamehub-lite/releases/tag/v5.3.3) modification to 5.3.5, two versions included, general changes:
- Disabled Discover and Free games tabs (as they don't work in both versions)
- DocumentsProvider patch included (app's /data/ can be accessed through file managers)
- Preserved original GameHub resources (icon and stuff, lazy to replace)
- Used package name - emuready.gamehub.lite
- Signed with testkey

Official API version:
- Uses GameSir server for downloading firmware/drivers/other components, usually up to date, may have privacy concerns
- More cluttered My Games list, includes PC/PS Link (idk if it is working)
- Can import Android games
- No login required
- Offline is working

EmuReady API version:
- Uses EmuReady server to download firmware/drivers/other components, more private
- Has more GPU drivers to download, but may not have the latest components to download
- Clean My Games list (only Windows emulation and Steam)
- Can't import Android games
- No login required
- Offline is working

Only difference in APK files are https server strings, everything else is the same!

releases.name: Winlator Xmod 1.1.0
releases.body:
Changelog

Alteração no layout

Adicionada a possibilidade de baixar drivers Turnip pelo próprio app

Adicionada a possibilidade de importar Wrapper pelos Contents (teste)

Adicionada a possibilidade de instalar os Commoredist (Visual C++ + PhysX)

Agora, ao importar o executável pela tela de atalho, ele extrai a capa do jogo (ainda não funciona para todos os jogos)

⚠️ O app ainda apresenta problemas na interface 😕
